using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using TodoApp.Data;
using TodoApp.Models;

namespace TodoApp.Services;

public class {{Name}}Service(ApplicationDbContext db) : I{{Name}}Service
{
    public async Task<List<{{Name}}>> GetAllAsync(string userId)
    {
        return await db.{{Name}}s
            .Where(x => x.UserId == userId)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.CreatedAt)
            .ToListAsync();
    }

    public async Task<{{Name}}?> GetByIdAsync(int id, string userId)
    {
        return await db.{{Name}}s
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.Id == id && x.UserId == userId);
    }

    public async Task<{{Name}}> CreateAsync({{Name}} item)
    {
        item.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        db.{{Name}}s.Add(item);
        await db.SaveChangesAsync();
        return item;
    }

    public async Task<{{Name}}> UpdateAsync({{Name}} item)
    {
        var existing = await db.{{Name}}s
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.Id == item.Id && x.UserId == item.UserId)
            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("{{Name}} not found.");

        // TODO: Map updated properties from item to existing

        await db.SaveChangesAsync();
        return existing;
    }

    public async Task DeleteAsync(int id, string userId)
    {
        var item = await db.{{Name}}s
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.Id == id && x.UserId == userId);
        if (item is not null)
        {
            db.{{Name}}s.Remove(item);
            await db.SaveChangesAsync();
        }
    }
}
